title: lomatium engelmannii
intro: Lomatium engelmannii, also known as Great Bitter Root, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lomatium engelmannii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Lomatium engelmannii include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
